name: First Safe Block Edit
decision_reason: SagaScript apply-block-edit consumes a passed block_patch_preview_v1.json for one StringLiteralEdit, writes a patched source copy, verifies changedSpanOnly, and rejects stale, malformed, opaque, unsupported, and failed-preview inputs. Maintainer verification, editor UI, full Visual Blocks editing, arbitrary C# rewriting, in-place mutation by default, runtime/server changes, package/distribution output, SDE work, StarterArena gameplay changes, and CSharpScriptHost changes remain absent.
